positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a mountain goat traversing a crescent moon. The goat is rendered with clean, geometric lines and strong silhouettes, embodying strength and grace. The background features stylized cosmic dust clouds and starry voids, designed for high-contrast print. Color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, charcoal black, and crisp cream. Composition is centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Flat graphic design style mixed with ethereal celestial art, vector art quality, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blur, noise, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, graffiti, cluttered, messy, complex background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, photorealism
